opening_line: Hi - I read a review where David mentioned tidy finishes on a job with RM ELECTRICAL. That stood out.
source_quote: Called Ryan on a Thursday asking to come replace our induction hob, he asked if he could come over on the following Monday as he was busy until then, i explained how  I needed it sooner & despite being booked up he managed to fit the job in the very next day . Excellent job done at a very fair price
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (David)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from David mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
